signals.reasoning: BTC still has mildly supportive negative funding, but the price/OI profile has softened into short-covering-rally rather than clean trend continuation. With the board clear but momentum less clean, it stays watch-only instead of a fresh buy.
ETH is in the same bucket as BTC: supportive negative funding underneath, but the move now looks more like short-covering than a clean new leg higher. Not a fresh entry here.
SOL is explicitly a no-trade setup on this board, with very weak squeeze edge and a soft short-covering profile. Clear stand-aside hold.
HEMI is heavily crowded and still trend-supported on price, which makes it too dangerous to short even though funding is very positive. Too late to chase long, too strong to fade cleanly.
VVV has a mildly bearish read, but the tape still looks more like short-covering noise than a clean trend failure. Not strong enough to act on.

TST still carries a bearish mechanical read and a long-liquidation-flush pattern, which makes it one of the cleaner bearish ideas on the sheet. It is still a smaller alt, so confidence stays moderate.
LDO still has constructive recovery structure, but positive funding and elevated cascade risk keep it below the bar for a clean new long. Watch-only.

BIO still has the strongest raw squeeze profile on the board with deeply negative funding and a trade-grade mechanical score. It remains extended and a bit thin, but with the board clear it is strong enough to keep upgraded.

LIT is one of the few names still showing fresh-shorts-pressing behavior instead of a completed flush or rally, which makes it a cleaner bearish lean than most of the board. Confidence stays moderate because it is still an alt and not highly liquid.

GRIFFAIN remains one of the clearest bearish leans with a strongly negative mechanical score and the worst relative price action on the sheet. This is still a thinner name, but it is one of the better short candidates available.
FARTCOIN still has constructive tape, but positive funding and a mature rebound profile make it less attractive than the stronger buy candidate in BIO. Watch-only.
